MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-26-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT YORAM MEHR'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
